title: polystichum dryopteris
intro: Polystichum dryopteris, also known as the male fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. Polystichum dryopteris can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in tinctures and salves, to harness its medicinal properties.
